name: Chocolate Earthquake Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box German chocolate cake mix – batter prepared according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x12 inch cake pan.
3. Cover the bottom of the pan with chopped nuts and coconut flakes.
4. Pour the prepared cake batter over the nuts and coconut.
5. In a separate bowl, melt the margarine, then add the cream cheese and confectioner's sugar. Stir until well blended.
6. Spoon the frosting mixture over the batter.
7. Bake for 40–42 minutes. The cake will appear sticky even when done, so do not attempt to test for doneness with a utensil.
